description: Transactional email delivery, SMS/voice APIs, and push notification services for application messaging.

entries.name: SendGrid
entries.summary: Transactional and marketing email delivery API with templates, analytics, and deliverability tooling.

entries.name: Mailgun
entries.summary: Developer-focused email API for sending, receiving, validating, and tracking email at scale.
entries.freeTier: Free trial credits for new accounts; ongoing free tier limited to a small monthly send volume.

entries.name: Resend
entries.summary: Modern transactional email API built with developer experience in mind, with React Email templating support.

entries.name: Postmark
entries.summary: Transactional email delivery focused on speed and deliverability, with detailed bounce/spam analytics.

entries.name: Amazon SES
entries.summary: Highly scalable, low-cost transactional email service from AWS, often used as a backend by other ESPs.
entries.freeTier: 62,000 emails/month free when sent from an EC2-hosted application (first 12 months).

entries.name: Twilio
entries.summary: SMS, voice, video, and WhatsApp messaging APIs, the most widely integrated communications platform.
entries.freeTier: Free trial credit for new accounts; no perpetual free production tier.
entries.paidFrom: Pay-as-you-go per message/minute, varies by country.

entries.name: Vonage (Nexmo)
entries.summary: SMS, voice, and verification APIs, similar in scope to Twilio with competitive per-message pricing.

entries.name: OneSignal
entries.summary: Push notifications, in-app messaging, and email for mobile and web apps.
entries.freeTier: Free for up to 10,000 subscribers on push notifications.
entries.paidFrom: Growth plan billed by subscriber count beyond free tier.

entries.name: Loops
entries.summary: Email platform purpose-built for SaaS startups, combining transactional and marketing email in one tool.
entries.freeTier: Free tier up to 1,000 contacts and 2,500 emails/month.

entries.name: Plunk
entries.summary: Open-source-friendly transactional and marketing email platform for startups and indie developers.
entries.freeTier: Free tier with limited monthly email sends.
entries.paidFrom: Pro plan billed monthly beyond free quota.
